banks_intro_1: Amabhange alawule imali amakhulu eminyaka, esebenza njengabaphakathi bokwenza imali nesango lohlelo lwezimali.
banks_intro_2: I-Bitcoin iyisistimu yemali yedijithali yontanga-ku-ntanga esebenza ngaphandle kwamabhange noma iziphathimandla eziyinhloko.
banks_intro_3: Kodwa inethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin ihluke kanjani esiStimini samabhange sendabuko? Ake sihlole umehluko oyinhloko phakathi kwalezi zindlela ezimbili ezihlukene kakhulu zemali.
point_1_summary_1: I-Bitcoin ayidingi mvume, okusho ukuthi noma ubani onokungeniswa ku-inthanethi angayisebenzisa ngaphandle kokubuza imvume kunoma iyiphi isiphathimandla.
point_1_summary_3: - akekho ongakuvimba ukufinyelela. Amabhange, nokho, angala ukuvula ama-akhawunti, avalele ama-akhawunti akhona, noma anqabe ukuhlinzeka ngenxa yezinqubomgomo zawo noma imithetho kahulumeni.
point_2_summary_1: Inethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin isebenza amahora angu-24 ngosuku, izinsuku ezingu-7 ngesonto, izinsuku ezingu-365 ngonyaka ngaphandle kwamahora okulungisa noma amaholidi. Amabhange anamahora alinganiselwe okusebenza, avalwa ngezimpelasonto nangamaholidi, futhi ngokuvamile anezinkathi zokulungisa uhlelo lapho izinsizakalo zingatholakali.
point_3_summary_1: Zonke izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin zirekhodwa ku-blockchain yomphakathi enoma ubani angayihlola futhi ayihlole.
point_3_summary_2: Amabhange asebenza nge-ledger eyimfihlo nezinqubo zangaphakathi ezingabonakali amakhasimende angekwazi ukuzihlola ngokuzimele.
point_4_summary_1: Nge-Bitcoin, ungagcina okhiye bakho bangasese futhi ube nokulawula okuphelele emalini yakho.
point_4_summary_3: ukuze uqonde ukuzigcinela. Amabhange agcina imali yakho kuma-akhawunti awo futhi angavalela, alingamise, noma avimbele ukufinyelela emalini yakho nganoma yisiphi isikhathi.
point_5_summary_1: Izimali zokwenza izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin zisobala, zilindeleke, futhi ngokuvamile ziphansi kakhulu. Amabhange ngokuvamile anezimali ezifihliwe, izimali zenyanga eze-akhawunti, izinhlawulo zokukhokhisa ngaphezu kwenani, izimali zokuthumela imali, izimali ze-ATM, nezinye izinhlawulo ezingakhula kakhulu ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
point_6_summary_1: I-Bitcoin ikuvimbela ukusebenzisa imali ongenayo - ungasebenzisa kuphela i-Bitcoin onayo ngempela. Amabhange avumela ukusebenzisa ngaphezu kwenani le-akhawunti yakho bese ekukhokhisa izimali ezinkulu ngale 'nsizakalo,' okuvame ukuholela ezinhlaizweni ezilandelayo.
point_7_summary_1: Izinkokhelo ze-Bitcoin aziphikisani nokuvinjelwa - uma sezithunyelwe kunethiwekhi, azikwazi ukuvalwa noma ukubuyiswa yinoma isiphi isiphathimandla esiyinhloko. Amabhange angavimba, avalele, abuyise, noma avimbele izinkokhelo ngokusekelwe ezinqubomgomweni zawo, emiyalelweni kahulumeni, noma kuma-algorithmu omsebenzi ongsolayo.
